title: Cobblestone Semantics
description: A Tech Mod Centered Around Automating Cobblestone!
body:
# Cobblestone Semantics

 

***

### A Minecraft Mod made with Java For Forge

 

#### Generate with Cobblestone Semantics, made by [IStrikeboomI](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI) and [ChauhanSai](https://github.com/ChauhanSai).

 

Cobblestone semantics adds new blocks and generators that, in combination, produce loads of lava and energy automatically! This mod also adds new armor and tools made from cobblestone infused obsidian.

 

Recommended with use of [JEI(Just Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) For Minecraft Java Version **1.18.2, 1.16.5, and 1.12.2**

 

Versions **1.16.5 and 1.12.2** have support for Tinkers Construct

 

**Additional config to tweak around delay times and energy produced**

***

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/432/439/310/172/blocks.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/432/440/310/172/items.png)**

***

## New Items:

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#cobblestone-infused-obsidian-armor)Cobblestone Infused Obsidian Armor

Provides 20 armor points

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#cobblestone-infused-obsidian-tools)Cobblestone Infused Obsidian Tools

Tiered between Diamond and Netherite

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#cobblestone-bags)Cobblestone Bags

Backpack Storage

*   Cobblestone Tier: 9 backpack slots
*   Upgraded Infused Tier: 27 backpack slots

***

## [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#new-blocks)New Blocks:

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#cobblestone-generator10-tiers)Cobblestone Generator(10 Tiers)

Produces Cobblestone

*   Dirt Tier: 64 cobblestone @ 1 cobblestone per 60 ticks
*   Stone Tier: 128 cobblestone @ 1 cobblestone per 40 ticks
*   Iron Tier: 256 cobblestone @ 1 cobblestone per 20 ticks
*   Redstone Tier: 512 cobblestone @ 1 cobblestone per 10 ticks
*   Gold Tier: 1,024 cobblestone @ 2 cobblestone per 7 ticks
*   Diamond Tier: 2,048 cobblestone @ 4 cobblestone per 5 ticks
*   Emerald Tier: 4,096 cobblestone @ 8 cobblestone per 4 ticks
*   Netherite Tier: 8,192 cobblestone @ 16 cobblestone per 3 ticks
*   Nether Star Tier: 16,384 cobblestone @ 32 cobblestone per 2 ticks
*   Dragon Egg Tier: 32,768 cobblestone @ 64 cobblestone per 1 ticks

 

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#cobblestone-melter)Cobblestone Melter

Produces 500mb of lava per 200 ticks for each cobblestone

 

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#lava-generator)Lava Generator

Produces 100,000 RF/FE per 200 ticks for each lava bucket

 

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#all-in-one-generator)All In One Generator

Automatically generates power when supplied with a Cobblestone Generator, Cobblestone Melter, and Lava Generator

 

#### [](https://github.com/IStrikeboomI/CobblestoneSemantics#cobblestone-infused-obsidian)Cobblestone Infused Obsidian

Strong, decorative block, material
